metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students pursue specialized study in food systems through focused exploration of topics such as baking and pastry, world cuisines, or food entrepreneurship. This course allows for deep engagement with chosen area of food specialization through projects, research, and practical application.
metadata.general_description: Specialized culinary focus areas including baking/pastry, world cuisines, or food entrepreneurship.

big_ideas.statement: Deep specialization in food enables mastery of techniques, knowledge, and innovation within chosen domains
big_ideas.elaboration: Whether in pastry, world cuisines, or food business, focused study develops expertise and professional-level competence.

big_ideas.statement: Specialized food knowledge combines technical skill, scientific understanding, and creative expression
big_ideas.elaboration: Specialization integrates hands-on practice, theoretical knowledge, and artistic innovation in culinary pursuits.

big_ideas.statement: Food specialization connects to broader food systems, cultural contexts, and sustainable practices
big_ideas.elaboration: Specialized food study encompasses understanding sourcing, traditions, sustainability, and business considerations.

big_ideas.statement: Food specializations create pathways to professional careers and entrepreneurial ventures
big_ideas.elaboration: Deep expertise in specific food areas enables employment, business creation, and leadership in food industries.

competencies.raw: Design specialized food products and offerings within chosen area
i_can_statements: I can develop product concepts within specialization
I can create standardized recipes and techniques
I can design product presentation and packaging
I can innovate within traditional and contemporary frameworks

competencies.raw: Design specialized menus or collections showcasing expertise
i_can_statements: I can create themed menus or curated collections
I can balance variety with signature offerings
I can incorporate seasonal and trending elements
I can design for different markets and occasions

competencies.raw: Design specialized projects demonstrating mastery and creativity
i_can_statements: I can conceptualize complex projects within specialization
I can plan execution with detailed specifications
I can integrate advanced techniques and approaches
I can design for professional or competitive contexts

competencies.raw: Design business or entrepreneurial ventures within food specialization
i_can_statements: I can develop business concepts in specialized area
I can plan operations and service models
I can create marketing and positioning strategies
I can design sustainable and scalable models

competencies.raw: Apply specialized techniques and methods with proficiency
i_can_statements: I can execute specialized techniques at advanced levels
I can troubleshoot problems specific to specialization
I can adapt and modify techniques for variation
I can mentor others in specialized skills

competencies.raw: Apply specialized knowledge across products and applications
i_can_statements: I can analyze and explain specialized concepts
I can apply scientific principles within specialization
I can evaluate quality and consistency
I can innovate based on specialized knowledge

competencies.raw: Apply business and professional skills in specialized context
i_can_statements: I can manage specialized operations
I can cost and price specialized products
I can market specialized offerings effectively
I can pursue professional development

competencies.raw: Apply research and project management in specialization
i_can_statements: I can research specialized topics deeply
I can conduct experiments and tests
I can document and present findings
I can manage complex specialized projects

competencies.raw: Use specialized equipment and tools within chosen area
i_can_statements: I can operate specialized equipment safely
I can maintain and troubleshoot equipment
I can adapt technology for specialized purposes
I can evaluate new tools and innovations

competencies.raw: Use digital tools for specialized content and documentation
i_can_statements: I can create digital content showcasing specialization
I can use specialized software and applications
I can develop digital resources and materials
I can document work through multimedia

competencies.raw: Use technology for specialized research and analysis
i_can_statements: I can research specialized topics using technology
I can analyze data related to specialization
I can use data to drive improvements
I can evaluate emerging technologies in field

competencies.raw: Use technology for professional marketing and communication
i_can_statements: I can create professional media showcasing work
I can build online presence for specialization
I can market specialized offerings digitally
I can communicate expertise and innovation

areas.name: Specialized Food Techniques and Methods
topics: Advanced techniques specific to chosen specialization
Science and chemistry of specialized food preparation
